pages.title: Terms of Service
pages.intro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the PepCare website, products, and services (collectively, the "Services"). PepCare supplies chemical and biochemical reference materials strictly for laboratory research purposes. By accessing our website or placing an order, you agree to be bound by these Terms. Please read them carefully before purchasing.

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.html:
By accessing this website, creating an account, or placing an order, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms, together with our Privacy Policy, Refund & Returns Policy, Shipping Policy, and Research Use Only & Acceptable Use Policy, all of which are incorporated by reference.

If you do not agree with any part of these Terms, you must not use the Services or purchase any products. We reserve the right to update or modify these Terms at any time. Changes take effect when posted to this page, and your continued use of the Services after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.

sections.heading: 2. Eligibility
sections.html:
The Services are intended solely for qualified researchers, scientific professionals, academic and research institutions, and commercial laboratories. By using the Services, you represent and warrant that:

  • You are at least 18 years of age (or the age of legal majority in your jurisdiction, whichever is greater);
  • You are a qualified professional, or are purchasing on behalf of a qualified institution, with the technical training and facilities required to handle research chemicals and biochemical materials safely;
  • You have the legal authority to enter into a binding agreement, including authority to bind any organization on whose behalf you order;
  • Your purchase and intended use comply with all applicable local, national, and international laws and regulations.

We may, at our sole discretion, request documentation verifying your professional or institutional status and may refuse or cancel any order where eligibility cannot be reasonably established.

sections.heading: 3. Research Use Only Restriction
sections.html:
All products sold by PepCare are supplied For Research Use Only (RUO). They are not drugs, foods, cosmetics, dietary supplements, or medical devices, and they are not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, mitigate, or prevent any disease or condition.

Products are not for human or veterinary use and must not be administered to humans or animals or introduced into the human or animal body in any form. Products must be handled exclusively by trained personnel in an appropriate, controlled laboratory environment. By placing an order, you certify that all products will be used solely for legitimate in vitro laboratory research and development purposes. The full scope of this restriction is detailed in our Research Use Only & Acceptable Use Policy.

sections.heading: 4. Accounts and Orders
sections.html:
To place an order, you may be required to create an account and provide accurate, current, and complete information. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activity that occurs under your account.

  • All orders are offers to purchase and are subject to acceptance by PepCare. We may decline, limit, or cancel any order at our discretion.
  • Order confirmation does not guarantee acceptance; a contract is formed only when we dispatch the products or expressly confirm acceptance.
  • We may require additional verification (including end-use or institutional confirmation) before processing certain orders.
  • You agree to notify us promptly of any unauthorized use of your account.

sections.heading: 5. Pricing and Payment
sections.html:
All prices are listed in the currency shown at checkout and are subject to change without notice. While we make every effort to ensure pricing accuracy, errors may occur. If a product is listed at an incorrect price, we reserve the right to cancel or refuse the affected order, even after order confirmation.

  • Prices exclude applicable taxes, duties, customs charges, and shipping fees unless otherwise stated.
  • Payment must be received in full before products are dispatched, unless agreed otherwise in writing.
  • You represent that you are authorized to use the payment method provided and that the payment information is accurate.
  • The buyer is responsible for any import duties, taxes, or customs fees levied by the destination country (see our Shipping Policy).

sections.heading: 6. Prohibited Uses
sections.html:
You agree that you will not, under any circumstances:

  • Use, administer, or apply any product for or in connection with human consumption, ingestion, injection, inhalation, or any other form of human or animal use;
  • Use any product for diagnostic, therapeutic, clinical, cosmetic, food, or supplement purposes;
  • Resell, repackage, or redistribute products for human or animal consumption, or market them as fit for such use;
  • Misrepresent the intended use of any product to PepCare or to any third party;
  • Use the Services for any unlawful purpose or in violation of any applicable law, regulation, or export control;
  • Make or imply any medical, therapeutic, or health claim regarding any product.

Violation of this section is a material breach of these Terms and may result in immediate cancellation of orders, account termination, and referral to appropriate authorities.

sections.heading: 7. Intellectual Property
sections.html:
All content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, product descriptions, specifications, images, and software, is the property of PepCare or its licensors and is protected by copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.

You may not copy, reproduce, distribute, modify, or create derivative works from any content without our prior written consent, except as necessary for your own internal, lawful evaluation of our products. The "PepCare" name and logo are trademarks and may not be used without authorization.

sections.heading: 8. Disclaimer of Warranties
sections.html:
Products are provided "as is" and "as available" for research purposes. To the fullest extent permitted by law, PepCare disclaims all warranties, express or implied, including but not limited to implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement.

We do not warrant that products are suitable for any specific research application beyond the published specifications, nor that the website will be uninterrupted, secure, or error-free. The buyer is solely responsible for determining the suitability, safety, and legality of any product for its intended research use, and for independently verifying purity, identity, and handling requirements.

sections.heading: 9. Limitation of Liability
sections.html:
To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, PepCare and its officers, employees, and affiliates shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or for any loss of profits, data, or goodwill, arising out of or related to your use of the Services or products.

In no event shall our total aggregate liability arising from or related to these Terms or any product exceed the amount you paid for the specific product giving rise to the claim. Because products are sold strictly for research use, we accept no liability whatsoever for any harm resulting from prohibited or unauthorized use, including any human or animal exposure.

sections.heading: 10. Indemnification
sections.html: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless PepCare and its affiliates from and against any claims, liabilities, damages, losses, costs, and expenses (including reasonable legal fees) arising out of or related to: (a) your breach of these Terms; (b) your misuse of any product, including any use outside the permitted research scope; (c) your violation of any law or the rights of any third party; or (d) any human or animal exposure to a product caused by you or those acting on your behalf.

sections.heading: 11. Governing Law and Disputes
sections.html:
These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction in which PepCare is established, without regard to its conflict-of-law principles. You agree that any dispute arising under these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent courts of that jurisdiction, unless mandatory consumer-protection law in your country provides otherwise.

If any provision of these Terms is found to be unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.

sections.heading: 12. Contact
sections.html:
For questions regarding these Terms, please contact our legal team:

  • Email: legal@pepcare.com

We aim to respond to all legitimate inquiries within a reasonable timeframe during normal business days.

pages.title: Privacy Policy
pages.intro: PepCare ("we," "us," or "our") is committed to protecting your privacy and handling your personal data responsibly and transparently. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, with whom we share it, and the rights available to you. It applies to information collected through our website, ordering systems, and related communications.

sections.heading: 1. Information We Collect
sections.html:
We collect information necessary to provide our Services, fulfil orders, and meet our legal and compliance obligations, including:

  • Account and contact details: name, business or institutional name, email address, telephone number, and role or professional title;
  • Order and billing information: shipping and billing addresses, order history, and transaction records;
  • Payment information: processed securely by our third-party payment processors; we do not store full card numbers on our systems;
  • Eligibility and compliance data: information you provide to verify professional or institutional status and intended research use;
  • Technical data: IP address, browser type, device identifiers, and usage data collected automatically via cookies and similar technologies.

sections.heading: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.html:
We use personal data only for legitimate purposes, including to:

  • Process, fulfil, and deliver your orders;
  • Verify eligibility and certify compliance with our Research Use Only requirements;
  • Communicate with you about orders, support requests, and account matters;
  • Detect, prevent, and address fraud, misuse, or security issues;
  • Comply with legal, regulatory, tax, and export-control obligations;
  • Improve our website, products, and customer experience;
  • Send service updates and, where permitted, marketing communications you may opt out of at any time.

We process your data on the legal bases of contract performance, legitimate interests, legal obligation, and, where required, consent.

sections.heading: 3. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
sections.html:
We use cookies and similar technologies to operate our website, remember your preferences, analyze traffic, and improve performance. These include:

  • Essential cookies required for core site functionality and checkout;
  • Analytics cookies that help us understand how visitors use the site;
  • Preference cookies that remember your settings.

You can control or disable non-essential cookies through your browser settings or our cookie banner where available. Disabling certain cookies may affect site functionality. We honor recognized browser-based opt-out signals where legally required.

sections.heading: 4. Third Parties and Data Processors
sections.html:
We share personal data only as necessary with trusted service providers who process it on our behalf under appropriate contractual safeguards, including:

  • Payment processors to handle transactions securely;
  • Shipping and logistics carriers to deliver orders;
  • IT, hosting, and analytics providers that support our infrastructure;
  • Compliance and fraud-prevention services.

We do not sell your personal data. We may disclose information where required by law, court order, or to protect our legal rights, or in connection with a corporate transaction such as a merger or acquisition.

sections.heading: 5. Data Retention
sections.html:
We retain personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes for which it was collected, including to satisfy legal, accounting, tax, and reporting requirements.

  • Order and transaction records are typically retained for the period required by applicable financial and tax laws;
  • Account information is retained while your account is active and for a reasonable period thereafter;
  • When data is no longer required, we securely delete or anonymize it.

sections.heading: 6. Data Security
sections.html:
We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect personal data against unauthorized access, loss, misuse, or alteration. These include encryption in transit, access controls, and secure handling of payment data via PCI-compliant processors.

However, no method of transmission or storage is completely secure. While we strive to protect your information, we cannot guarantee absolute security. You are responsible for keeping your account credentials confidential.

sections.heading: 7. Your Privacy Rights
sections.html:
Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have rights regarding your personal data. Under the EU/UK General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA/CPRA), these may include the right to:

  • Access the personal data we hold about you;
  • Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data;
  • Request deletion of your data, subject to legal retention obligations;
  • Object to or restrict certain processing;
  • Request data portability;
  • Opt out of the "sale" or "sharing" of personal data (we do not sell personal data);
  • Withdraw consent where processing is based on consent.

To exercise any of these rights, contact us at legal@pepcare.com. We will respond within the timeframes required by applicable law and will not discriminate against you for exercising your rights.

sections.heading: 8. International Data Transfers
sections.html: Your personal data may be processed and stored in countries other than your own, including by service providers located in other jurisdictions. Where data is transferred internationally, we rely on appropriate safeguards such as Standard Contractual Clauses or equivalent legally recognized mechanisms to ensure your data receives an adequate level of protection.

sections.heading: 9. Children's Privacy
sections.html: Our Services are intended exclusively for professional and institutional use by individuals aged 18 or older. We do not knowingly collect personal data from minors. If we become aware that we have inadvertently collected data from a minor, we will delete it promptly.

sections.heading: 10. Contact and Data Protection Officer
sections.html:
For any privacy-related questions, requests, or complaints, or to contact our Data Protection Officer (DPO), please reach us at:

  • Email: legal@pepcare.com

If you are located in the EU/UK and believe your data has been handled improperly, you also have the right to lodge a complaint with your local data protection supervisory authority.

pages.title: Refund & Returns Policy
pages.intro: At PepCare, we want you to receive your research materials accurately, intact, and in suitable condition. Because our products are sensitive research chemicals and biochemical reference materials, returns are necessarily limited for safety, quality, and integrity reasons. This policy explains when refunds or replacements are available and how to start a claim.

sections.heading: 1. Order Accuracy
sections.html:
We take care to ensure every order is picked, prepared, and shipped correctly. Upon receipt, please inspect your order promptly and verify that the products, quantities, and specifications match your order confirmation.

If you believe there is an error in your order, contact us as soon as possible so we can investigate and resolve the issue. Please retain all packaging, labels, and documentation until the matter is resolved.

sections.heading: 2. Damaged or Incorrect Items
sections.html:
If your order arrives damaged, defective, or incorrect, you must notify us within 7 calendar days of delivery. To process your claim, please provide:

  • Your order number;
  • A clear description of the issue;
  • Photographs of the affected product, labels, and outer/inner packaging, including any visible damage;
  • Where relevant, evidence of the condition of cold-chain packaging on arrival.

Verified claims for damaged or incorrect items will be resolved by replacement or refund at our discretion. Claims submitted after the 7-day window may not be eligible.

sections.heading: 3. Conditions for Returns of Research Materials
sections.html:
Due to the sensitive nature of research chemicals and biochemicals, returns are accepted only under strict conditions. A return may be considered only where the item is:

  • Unopened and unused, with all original tamper-evident seals and labeling fully intact;
  • Authorized in advance by us via a Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA);
  • Returned within the window stated in your RMA.

Cold-chain caveat: Products that require temperature-controlled storage (refrigerated, frozen, or shipped on dry ice / ice packs) generally cannot be returned once delivered, because their stability and integrity cannot be guaranteed once they leave our controlled custody. Such items are eligible for refund or replacement only in cases of verified shipping damage or our error.

sections.heading: 4. Non-Returnable Items
sections.html:
For safety, quality, and regulatory reasons, the following are not returnable and are not eligible for refund except in the case of our error or verified shipping damage:

  • Opened, used, or partially used products;
  • Products with broken or missing tamper-evident seals;
  • Temperature-sensitive / cold-chain products once delivered;
  • Custom, made-to-order, or specially synthesized items;
  • Products returned without a valid RMA;
  • Products that have been stored or handled outside of their required conditions after delivery.

sections.heading: 5. Refund Method and Timing
sections.html:
Approved refunds are issued to the original payment method used for the purchase. Please note:

  • Refunds are processed after we receive and inspect any returned item, or after a claim is verified for damaged/incorrect goods;
  • We typically initiate approved refunds within 5 to 10 business days of approval;
  • The time for funds to appear in your account depends on your bank or card issuer;
  • Original shipping charges are generally non-refundable except where the return results from our error or a defective product.

sections.heading: 6. Order Cancellations
sections.html: You may request to cancel an order before it has been dispatched. Once an order has been processed or shipped, it can no longer be cancelled and will be subject to this Refund & Returns Policy. Custom or specially prepared orders may not be cancellable once production has begun. We also reserve the right to cancel any order in accordance with our Terms of Service and Compliance Policy, in which case any payment taken will be refunded.

sections.heading: 7. How to Start a Claim
sections.html:
To request a return, replacement, or refund, please contact us with your order details:

  • Email: legal@pepcare.com
  • Include your order number, a description of the issue, and supporting photographs where applicable.

Do not ship any item back without first receiving a Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA). Unauthorized returns may be refused and may not be eligible for refund. All returns must comply with applicable shipping, safety, and transport regulations for the materials involved.

pages.title: Shipping Policy
pages.intro: This Shipping Policy explains how PepCare processes, packages, and ships research materials, and outlines the responsibilities of the receiver. Because many of our products are temperature-sensitive, proper handling and prompt receipt are essential to maintaining product integrity.

sections.heading: 1. Order Processing Time
sections.html:
Orders are typically processed within 1 to 3 business days of payment confirmation and successful eligibility/compliance verification. Processing times may be longer for custom items, large orders, periods of high demand, or where additional verification is required.

Orders are dispatched on business days only. Orders placed on weekends or public holidays are processed on the next business day. You will receive a confirmation once your order ships.

sections.heading: 2. Cold-Chain and Packaging
sections.html:
Temperature-sensitive products are packaged to maintain stability during transit using appropriate methods such as insulated containers, gel ice packs, or dry ice, depending on the product's requirements.

  • Cold-chain shipments are timed to minimize transit duration and are typically shipped using expedited services;
  • Upon arrival, cold-chain products must be inspected and transferred to appropriate storage immediately;
  • Coolants such as dry ice are intended only to maintain temperature in transit and may have partially or fully dissipated on arrival without affecting product integrity, provided the item is promptly stored correctly.

All products are packaged in compliance with applicable transport and safety regulations.

sections.heading: 3. Carriers
sections.html: We ship via established, reputable carriers selected based on destination, product requirements, and transit speed. For temperature-sensitive or time-critical shipments, we use expedited or specialized services as needed. The carrier and service level for your order are determined at the time of dispatch and may be reflected in your shipping confirmation.

sections.heading: 4. Domestic and International Shipping
sections.html:
We offer both domestic and international shipping where permitted by law. Available shipping options and costs are displayed at checkout based on your destination and the products ordered.

  • Domestic shipments generally arrive within standard carrier transit times after dispatch;
  • International shipments may take longer due to distance, carrier routing, and customs clearance;
  • Certain products may be available for domestic shipping only, or may be subject to additional restrictions for international destinations.

sections.heading: 5. Customs, Duties, and Taxes
sections.html:
For international orders, the buyer is the importer of record and is solely responsible for any customs duties, import taxes, VAT, brokerage fees, or other charges imposed by the destination country. These charges are not included in the product price or shipping fee and are collected by the carrier or customs authority.

Buyers are responsible for ensuring that the products they order may be lawfully imported into their country and that they hold any required permits or authorizations. We are not responsible for delays, seizures, or refusals by customs authorities, and we do not refund charges arising from customs processing.

sections.heading: 6. Restricted Destinations
sections.html:
We do not ship to destinations where the sale, import, or possession of a given product is prohibited or restricted by applicable law, export controls, or sanctions. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel any order to a destination we determine to be restricted, high-risk, or non-compliant.

It is the buyer's responsibility to confirm that the products ordered are legal to receive and use in their jurisdiction. Orders to restricted destinations will be cancelled and refunded in accordance with our policies.

sections.heading: 7. Tracking
sections.html: Once your order ships, we will provide a tracking number where available so you can monitor its progress. For cold-chain shipments, we strongly recommend tracking your package closely and arranging for someone to be available to receive and store it immediately upon delivery.

sections.heading: 8. Lost or Delayed Packages
sections.html:
While we make every effort to ensure timely delivery, transit times are estimates and are not guaranteed once a package is in the carrier's custody. Delays may occur due to weather, customs, carrier issues, or other factors beyond our control.

  • If your package appears lost or significantly delayed, contact us promptly so we can assist in tracing it with the carrier;
  • Claims for lost shipments are subject to carrier investigation timelines;
  • For temperature-sensitive items, delivery delays caused by the buyer's unavailability or by customs are at the buyer's risk.

sections.heading: 9. Receiver Responsibility
sections.html:
By placing an order, the receiver agrees to:

  • Provide an accurate, complete shipping address and ensure someone is available to receive the shipment;
  • Inspect shipments promptly on arrival and report any damage in line with our Refund & Returns Policy;
  • Immediately store products under their required conditions (e.g., refrigerated or frozen) using appropriate, calibrated laboratory equipment;
  • Handle all products as hazardous research materials, following the relevant Safety Data Sheet (SDS/MSDS) and using suitable personal protective equipment and facilities.

PepCare is not responsible for product degradation or loss resulting from improper storage, handling, or delayed receipt after delivery.

pages.title: Research Use Only & Acceptable Use Policy
pages.intro: This Research Use Only & Acceptable Use Policy defines the strict terms under which PepCare supplies its products. All products are sold exclusively as reference materials for laboratory research and development. By purchasing from us, you certify that you understand and accept these conditions. This policy supplements our Terms of Service.

sections.heading: 1. For Research Use Only, Not for Human Consumption
sections.html:
All products sold by PepCare are For Research Use Only (RUO) and are NOT for human consumption.

Our products are intended exclusively for in vitro laboratory research and development conducted by qualified professionals. They are not drugs, foods, dietary supplements, cosmetics, or medical devices, and they have not been approved by any regulatory authority for human or veterinary use. Products must never be ingested, injected, inhaled, applied to, or otherwise introduced into the body of any human or animal.

sections.heading: 2. Buyer Eligibility and Certification of Research Use
sections.html:
By placing an order, you represent, warrant, and certify that:

  • You are at least 18 years of age and a qualified researcher, or are ordering on behalf of a legitimate research institution or commercial laboratory;
  • You possess the necessary training, expertise, equipment, and facilities to handle research chemicals and biochemicals safely;
  • All products will be used solely for legitimate laboratory research purposes and not for any prohibited use;
  • You will not provide, resell, or transfer any product to any person or entity that you know or suspect intends to use it for human or animal consumption.

We may request documentation to verify your professional or institutional status at any time.

sections.heading: 3. Prohibited Uses
sections.html:
You must not use, or permit others to use, any product for:

  • Human or animal consumption of any kind, including ingestion, injection, inhalation, or topical application;
  • Diagnostic, therapeutic, clinical, or treatment purposes;
  • Use as or in a food, beverage, dietary supplement, or cosmetic;
  • Resale or redistribution for consumption, or marketing of products as fit for human or animal use;
  • Any unlawful purpose or any activity that violates applicable laws, regulations, export controls, or sanctions.

Any such use is strictly prohibited, constitutes a material breach of our terms, and is undertaken entirely at the buyer's own risk and liability.

sections.heading: 4. Regulatory Responsibility Lies with the Buyer
sections.html:
The buyer is solely responsible for ensuring that the purchase, import, possession, storage, handling, use, and disposal of any product complies with all applicable laws and regulations in the buyer's jurisdiction.

  • The buyer must obtain any licenses, permits, or authorizations required to handle the products;
  • The buyer is responsible for determining the legal status of each product in their country prior to ordering;
  • PepCare makes no representation that any product is legal or appropriate for use in any particular jurisdiction.

sections.heading: 5. No Medical or Therapeutic Claims
sections.html:
PepCare makes no medical, therapeutic, health, or efficacy claims of any kind regarding its products. No information provided on our website, in product descriptions, or in any communication should be interpreted as a recommendation, endorsement, or instruction to use any product on humans or animals.

Any references to research findings, mechanisms, or properties are provided for informational and scientific reference purposes only and do not constitute claims of safety, efficacy, or suitability for any use beyond laboratory research.

sections.heading: 6. Age and Jurisdiction Restrictions
sections.html:
Purchases are restricted to individuals aged 18 years or older (or the age of majority in their jurisdiction, whichever is greater) who are qualified to handle research materials. We do not sell to minors.

We do not sell into jurisdictions where the sale or possession of a given product is prohibited, and we comply with applicable export controls and sanctions. Orders that cannot be lawfully fulfilled will be refused or cancelled.

sections.heading: 7. Right to Refuse or Cancel Orders
sections.html:
PepCare reserves the right, at its sole discretion and without obligation to provide a reason, to refuse, limit, suspend, or cancel any order where:

  • We have reason to believe the products may be used for a prohibited or unlawful purpose;
  • Buyer eligibility or intended research use cannot be reasonably verified;
  • The order is destined for a restricted jurisdiction or recipient;
  • We suspect fraud, misrepresentation, or breach of our terms.

Where an order is cancelled by us, any payment taken will be refunded in accordance with our Refund & Returns Policy.

sections.heading: 8. Safety Data Sheets and Handling Responsibility
sections.html:
Research chemicals and biochemicals may be hazardous and must be handled only by trained personnel under appropriate laboratory conditions. The buyer is responsible for:

  • Reviewing the applicable Safety Data Sheet (SDS/MSDS) and product documentation before handling;
  • Using suitable personal protective equipment (PPE), engineering controls, and facilities;
  • Storing products under their required conditions and following all safety, transport, and disposal regulations;
  • Ensuring all personnel who handle the products are properly trained and authorized.

An SDS is available on request. PepCare is not liable for harm, loss, or damage resulting from improper handling, storage, or use of any product.

sections.heading: 9. Acknowledgement and Contact
sections.html:
By placing an order, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agreed to this Research Use Only & Acceptable Use Policy, and you certify that all products will be used in compliance with it. Violation of this policy may result in order cancellation, account termination, and, where appropriate, referral to relevant authorities.

For compliance questions or to request a Safety Data Sheet, contact us:

  • Email: legal@pepcare.com
